CREATE TABLE entries (k INT, v STRING);
SELECT map_from_entries(ARRAY(SELECT STRUCT(k, v) FROM entries)) AS result;
CREATE TABLE additional_entries (k INT, v STRING);
SELECT map_from_entries(ARRAY(SELECT STRUCT(k, v) FROM entries UNION SELECT STRUCT(k, v) FROM additional_entries)) AS combined_result;
CREATE TABLE nested_entries (id INT, entries STRUCT(k INT, v STRING)[]);
INSERT INTO nested_entries VALUES (1, [{k: 5, v: 'val1'}, {k: 3, v: 'val2'}]), (2, [{k: 1, v: 'val6'}, {k: 2, v: 'val7'}]);
SELECT id, map_from_entries(entries) AS result FROM nested_entries;
CREATE TABLE multi_entries (id INT, entry STRUCT(k INT, v STRING));
INSERT INTO multi_entries VALUES (1, STRUCT(5, 'val1')), (1, STRUCT(3, 'val2')), (2, STRUCT(1, 'val3'));
SELECT id, map_from_entries(ARRAY(SELECT entry FROM multi_entries WHERE id = 1)) AS result FROM multi_entries GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, map_from_entries(ARRAY(SELECT entry FROM multi_entries WHERE id = id)) AS result FROM multi_entries GROUP BY id;
SELECT map_from_entries(ARRAY(SELECT STRUCT(k, v) FROM (VALUES (5, 'val1'), (3, 'val2'), (NULL, 'val3')) AS t(k, v))) AS result;
